name: ai-expert-skills
description: Domain-specific expert skills for AI coding assistants: language experts, deep learning, LLM testing, architecture, GitHub, and Three.js.

plugins.name: competitive-programming-expert
plugins.description: Algorithmic problem solving, complexity analysis, and optimization for LeetCode/Codeforces/AtCoder.

plugins.name: cpp-expert
plugins.description: Modern C++ (17/20/23) expert for safe, performant code, templates, and UB/memory diagnosis.

plugins.name: python-expert
plugins.description: Pythonic code, typing, async, standard-library usage, and performance tuning.

plugins.name: deep-learning-expert
plugins.description: Model architecture design, training strategies, debugging, and paper interpretation (PyTorch/TensorFlow).

plugins.name: llm-testing-expert
plugins.description: Evaluation strategies, prompt engineering, red teaming, and regression testing for LLMs.

plugins.name: software-architect
plugins.description: High-level system design, technology selection, and architecture trade-off analysis.

plugins.name: github-master
plugins.description: Git workflows, repository management, pull requests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

plugins.name: threejs
plugins.description: Complete Three.js skill set: fundamentals, geometry, materials, lighting, textures, animation, loaders, shaders, post-processing, and interaction.
